stemHtml: For a take-off from a contaminated runway, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The greater the depth of contamination at constant take-off mass, the more V<sub>1</sub> has to be decreased to compensate for decreasing friction.
options.b: A slush covered runway must be cleared before take-off, even if the performance data for contaminated runway is available.
options.c: Dry snow is not considered to affect the take-off performance.
options.d: The take-off performance data is generally determined by the manufacturers by calculation, only a few values are verified by flight tests.
